page_content: Course Title Required Courses Biochemistry BCHM461 Biochemistry I or BCHM463 Biochemistry of Physiology Select one of the following Quantitative Courses: BIOM301 Introduction to Biometrics BSCI374 Mathematical Modeling in Biology (Lab) 1 STAT400 Applied Probability and Statistics I STAT464 Introduction to Biostatistics MATH240 Introduction to Linear Algebra General Biology Area Courses. At least one course from each area: Genetics & Evolution, Cell Biology, Development, & Physiology, and Ecology, Behavior, & Organismal. Genetics and Evolution BCHM465 Biochemistry III BSCI370 Principles of Evolution BSCI402 BSCI405 Population and Evolutionary Genetics (Lab) BSCI407 Behavioral Genetics BSCI410 Molecular Genetics BSCI411 Bioinformatics and Integrated Genomics (Lab) BSCI412 Microbial Genetics (Lab) BSCI414 Recombinant DNA Laboratory BSCI415 Molecular Genetics Laboratory BSCI416 Human Genetics BSCI471 Molecular Evolution Cell Biology, Development, and Physiology BCHM462 Biochemistry II BCHM464 Biochemistry Laboratory BSCI330 Cell Biology and Physiology (Lab) BSCI342 Biology of Reproduction BSCI348 Special Topics in Cell Biology and Molecular Genetics (BSCI348C: Cell Biology Lab) BSCI353 Cellular and Molecular Neuroscience BSCI404 Cell Biology from a Biophysical Perspective
